---
title: "mcp-meta.test.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/skills_db/cachebro/test/mcp-meta.test.ts"
loc: 99
complexity: 1
logic_score: 5.17
style_score: 3.83
intel_score: 5.44
overall_score: 5.81
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 14 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [createCache](file://@turso/cachebro)
- [writeFileSync](file://fs)
- [mkdirSync](file://fs)
- [rmSync](file://fs)
- [readFileSync](file://fs)
- [join](file://path)

### Exports
- `TEST_DIR`
- `DB_PATH`
- `FILE_PATH`
- `FILE_PATH_2`
- `createCache`
- `packageJsonPath`
- `packageJson`
- `expectedNamespace`
- `r1`
- `metaKey`
- `metaValue`
- `r2`
- `r3`
- `files`
- `metaStructure`
- `fallbackNamespace`
- `parts`
